case_title: LOUIS THIERY ET AL VS. IRIS ALUF MEDINA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-22-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, IRIS ALUF
ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, SMALL CLAIMS HEARING SCHEDULED FOR 8:30 AM ON DEC-24-2020 WILL BE HEARD AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-24-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-11-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO MAY 26, 2021 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506 IF NO APPEARANCES, MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-26-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LOUIS THIERY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IRIS ALUF MEDINA IS PRESENT.COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1,700 + $90.00 FOR COURT COSTS, TOTAL AMOUNT TO BE PAID IS $1,790.00. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF SETTLEMENT AMOUNT IS PAID IN FULL AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF SETTLEMENT IS NOT PAID, APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT MAY BE ISSUED AT THAT TIME. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,036.00 FILED BY THIERY, LOUIS RACKAITYTE, ELZE AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, IRIS ALUF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIERY, LOUIS RACKAITYTE, ELZE AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, IRIS ALUF
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-24-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
